summary: Comprehensive testing of Feelings Houses vacation rental website completed. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI flows verified working correctly.

issues: Page title 'Διαχείριση Σπιτιών' appears faded/low contrast in header area

critical_code_review_comments: Admin panel is unprotected (no authentication) - known limitation per requirements
Contact form uses Resend API with real email sending - working correctly
Properties have price_per_night set to 0 (showing 'Price on request') - appears intentional

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, forms work, API integration verified)

test_credentials: No authentication required - admin panel is unprotected
seed_data_creation: 4 properties auto-seeded on startup from seed_properties.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified: Properties API returns 4 houses with Airbnb photos and ratings, Contact form sends real emails via Resend API, Admin panel allows editing property details. No mocked APIs - all integrations are real.

backend_api.GET /api/properties/: Returns 4 properties with Airbnb photos, ratings, bilingual names
backend_api.GET /api/properties/{id}: Returns single property, 404 for invalid ID
backend_api.PUT /api/properties/{id}: Updates property price and persists to DB
backend_api.POST /api/contact/submit: Sends email via Resend API to feelingshouses@gmail.com

frontend_ui.Homepage: Loads properties from API, displays 4 property cards with images
frontend_ui.Properties page: Shows 4 houses with Airbnb photos, star ratings, filter buttons
frontend_ui.Admin Properties: Table with 4 properties, edit functionality works
frontend_ui.Contact page: Form submits successfully, Google Maps embedded

email_verification.status: Working - emails sent successfully via Resend API
